statement: Regression guard: "Flaky test failure under parallelism: native tree-sitter module resolution race on Windows" must not recur.
rationale: Derived from bug_b6f1abb9a6: Race condition during parallel test execution on Windows: removeStaleCopies() in one test process deletes temporary native module copies while peer processes are still resolving/loading them. Amplified by multiple native packages (tree-sitter, tree-sitter-python) increasing copy traffic, and ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 in VS Code terminals. [Uncertainty: exact race sequence and whether recent synthesize.ts diff contributed to changed test parallelism pattern unknown.]
